Dr. Reza Orouji 20+ Years Experience
Aesthetic Specialist · DHA Licensed

Men's Skin Deserves Real Treatment

Most men don't realise their skin is losing collagen from their 30s onwards — resulting in a tired, heavier, older-looking face. At Paramy Polyclinic, we offer the Luxury Collagen Skin Booster — a premium Italian-grade treatment using the advanced 3-Layer Cellular Injection Technique that tackles the root cause, not just the surface.

One session delivers tighter skin, sharper jawline definition, reduced puffiness and a cleaner, fresher appearance — with zero surgery, zero scarring and zero recovery time. You walk in, you walk out looking better.

The 4-in-1 Transformation Protocol for Men

Tighten · Define · Brighten · Restore

1

Skin Tightening & Firming

Stimulates collagen and elastin deep in the skin — reducing sagging, improving firmness and restoring a more defined, structured facial appearance.

2

Pigmentation & Dark Spot Correction

Targets sun damage, uneven skin tone and dark spots accumulated over years of outdoor exposure — common in men aged 30–60.

3

Brightness & Clarity

Eliminates that dull, grey, or tired look — replacing it with a clean, healthy complexion that doesn't look "done" or overdone.

4

Deep Hydration & Texture

Restores skin thickness and hydration from within — improving rough texture, reducing pores and giving the skin a naturally healthy appearance.

This treatment is for you if you're experiencing

  • A tired, heavy or aged appearance that doesn't match how you feel
  • Loose or sagging skin around the jaw, cheeks or eyes
  • Sun damage, dark spots or uneven skin tone
  • Dull, rough or dehydrated skin texture
  • Loss of facial definition and jawline sharpness
  • Fine lines and early signs of aging from your 30s onwards

Ideal for men aged 30–60 who want a natural, effective, doctor-led solution that fits around a busy schedule — no surgery, no time off work, no one needs to know.

Men's skin loses collagen 20% faster after 40. One targeted treatment session can set that clock back by years — naturally, without surgery, without anyone knowing.

Frequently Asked Questions

Is this treatment suitable for men?
Absolutely. The Luxury Collagen Skin Booster is highly effective for men — in fact, men often see faster, more dramatic results because male skin is thicker and produces collagen more readily when stimulated. Dr. Orouji has treated many male patients aged 30–60 with outstanding results.
Will anyone be able to tell I've had a treatment?
No. This is not a filler — there is no artificial volume, puffiness or "done" look. Results are natural and gradual. People will notice you look fresher, younger and sharper, but won't know why.
How long does the session take and when can I return to work?
Each session takes 45–60 minutes including consultation. There is zero downtime — you can return to work, the gym, or any activity immediately after treatment.
How quickly will I see results?
Most men notice improved skin texture, freshness and clarity after the first session. Full results — including tighter skin, sharper definition and reduced pigmentation — develop over 6–12 weeks as collagen production accelerates.
How long do the results last?
Results typically last 12–18 months. The 3-Month Collagen Restoration Program (3 sessions) produces deeper, longer-lasting results. A simple annual top-up maintains optimal skin quality.
Is the treatment painful?
Minimal discomfort. A numbing cream is applied before the procedure. Most male patients rate the discomfort as 1–2 out of 10 and find it very tolerable throughout.
